prompt.title: Prompt Preview
prompt.subtitle: Preview Session prompts and Flow prompt-like configurations. Select a PromptBuild node on the canvas to view the final render result.
prompt.noPreviewHint: Add PromptBuild nodes to your Flow or define prompts in your Session to see previews here.
prompt.engineDisconnectedHint: Connect to the engine to load prompt previews.
